hero.description: A space to share the hobby, play games, and promote the Catalan language through gaming.

about.title: Who are we?
about.text: Darkstone Catalunya is a non-profit association dedicated to promoting board games and role-playing games.
about.card1_text: We want to create a meeting point for all players.
about.card2_text: Foster an inclusive and friendly environment.
about.card3_text: Become a local reference for alternative leisure.
about.card1_alt: Players enjoying a board game session at Darkstone Catalunya
about.card2_alt: Inclusive and welcoming atmosphere during a game session
about.card3_alt: Board game collection available at the association

activities.title: What do we do?
activities.text: We organize weekly games, tournaments, demonstrations, and open houses.

board_games.title: Board Games
board_games.description: From classics to the latest releases. We have a constantly growing game library.

rpg.title: Role Playing Games
rpg.description: Long-running campaigns and one-shots. D&D, Pathfinder, Cthulhu, and many indie systems.

events.title: Events & Tournaments
events.description: We organize friendly and competitive tournaments, as well as special themed days.

egara.title: Egara Juga
egara.description: Our flagship event. A weekend full of games, raffles, and community open to the whole city.

location.title: Where are we?
location.centre_description: Rehabilitated industrial warehouse · Plaça del Tint, 4
location.photo_alt: Interior of Casal Cívic Ca N'Aurell — rehabilitated industrial warehouse

schedule.title: When do we meet?
schedule.general_info: We meet every Friday afternoon and Saturday morning at Centre Cívic Ca N'Aurell.

footer.tagline: Board Game & RPG Association in Terrassa
footer.description: A space to share the hobby, play games, and promote the Catalan language through gaming.

join_us.cta_subtitle: It's free. Come any Friday or Saturday.
join_us.subtitle: Connect with us
join_us.telegram_description: We have a chat on Telegram where we talk about many things and also make plans and say what we feel like playing that weekend in Darkstone.
join_us.ludoya_description: In addition we use Ludoya, a social app specific for board games. In this we organize events and schedule the games we will play, and you can sign up and chat about them.

about_page.origin_text: The association was born from the initiative of a group of board game and RPG enthusiasts living in Terrassa, who had been organizing informal meetups in the area for some time. With the desire to have a stable structure, their own space, and the ability to organize events independently, they decided to formalize the project. After a process of deliberation and administrative procedures, the association was officially founded on September 14, 2024.
about_page.mission_text: Create a meeting space for board game and RPG players from Terrassa and surroundings, promoting alternative leisure in an inclusive, friendly, and Catalan-speaking environment.
about_page.vision_text: Become a local reference and be recognized by publishers and distributors as an active and reliable association for demonstrations, events, and collaborations.
about_page.value_inclusivity: Open to players of all levels, from beginners to veterans.
about_page.value_catalan: We promote the use of the Catalan language in the gaming space.
about_page.value_community: Gaming as an excuse to build bonds and meet new people.
about_page.value_fun: Relaxed and friendly atmosphere, both at and away from the table.
about_page.value_alternative: Championing board games and RPGs as cultural forms of leisure.
about_page.board_description: The people who make Darkstone Catalunya possible.
about_page.timeline_desc_6: With the Tenshin Japanese association of Terrassa
about_page.timeline_desc_8: Second edition of the flagship event
about_page.timeline_desc_10: Event at the History Museum of Catalonia
about_page.why_join_text: Becoming a member is free and doesn't unlock exclusive access to anything you can't already enjoy. But every member counts: our membership numbers are our argument when negotiating with institutions for our own venue. And when we get it, members will be the first to benefit.
about_page.why_join_point_1: Our member count gives us institutional weight when negotiating with the City Council and other entities for our own venue.
about_page.why_join_point_2: With our own venue in the future, members will be the first to benefit from improvements.
about_page.why_join_point_3: 15% discount at Trollcave by showing your member card, which you'll receive upon registration.
about_page.why_join_point_4: Membership is completely free. There's no barrier to entry.
about_page.cta_title: Want to be part of it?
about_page.cta_subtitle: Membership is free. Come any Friday or Saturday to Casal Cívic Ca N'Aurell and join us.

conduct.title: Code of conduct
conduct.intro: This document contains what we consider proper behaviour and is what we expect from those who wish to participate or get involved in DarkStone Catalunya's activities, including players, game masters, and administrators.
conduct.safe_space_text: We consider diversity on equal footing an essential good, therefore discriminatory attitudes are not acceptable for any reason, including but not limited to discrimination based on gender, sexual orientation, identity, or origin.
conduct.safe_space_harassment: Harassment and the use of threats have no place in this space, and we ask that if you suffer or witness them, you contact the administrators to prevent it.
conduct.safe_space_safety: To ensure this, we ask people who run games to use safety measures such as the X card, the traffic light system, or lines and veils, as well as any other measure that allows the smooth running of games.
conduct.safe_space_protocol: In case of harassment or any other type of abuse, follow the DarkStone Catalunya <link>Anti-Harassment Protocol</link>.
conduct.catalan_text: One of our organization's objectives is to promote the use of Catalan in leisure spaces and games and during organized play. For this reason, we ask for your involvement and to promote its use as the priority language whenever possible. Not knowing the language is in no case an impediment to participating in games or being part of the group, but we ask for a positive and generous attitude in this regard. We are sure that together we will do everything possible to understand each other and help improve language skills if necessary!
conduct.communication_title: Space for understanding and respectful communication
conduct.communication_respectful: Be respectful, considerate, and constructive: Disagreement, which happens often, is not an excuse for rudeness or personal attacks. When responding, offer alternatives instead of negatives. Remember that a community where people feel uncomfortable cannot be fun, a key issue for achieving our main goal: having a great time playing.
conduct.communication_patient: Be patient and generous: If someone asks for help, it's because they need it. Offer kind responses that can help the person asking without resorting to aggressive replies or the «read the manual» style.
conduct.communication_understand: Make an effort to correctly understand what people mean: Remember that decisions are often a difficult choice between opposing poles. If you disagree, please express yourself courteously. If something seems outrageous, check that you haven't misinterpreted it. When in doubt, ask for clarification, but don't assume the most negative interpretation.
conduct.communication_concise: Try to be concise: Avoid repeating what has already been said. Unnecessarily prolonging conversations makes them hard to follow. People may feel personally offended when receiving many messages that repeat the same thing.
conduct.communication_topics: Respect the topics and copyrights: Do not send messages with topics unrelated to the scope of the communication space you are addressing. For example, commercial messages, or political or religious content. On the other hand, we ask that you do not share copyrighted material on the channel.
conduct.collaboration_text: Collaboration is fundamental in community-based projects. We encourage you to work together whether within or outside your own projects, seeking synergies. Collaboration reduces redundant efforts and improves the quality of our work. Internally and externally, we must always be open to collaboration.
conduct.open_tables_text: DarkStone Catalunya is an open social space where we want to encourage neighbourhood and collective participation. For this reason, we ask that proposed activities be, whenever possible, open to new participants. The DarkStone Catalunya coordination team will ensure that there is always at least one open table so that anyone interested who requests it with enough notice can play with us as far as possible. Furthermore, we encourage established gaming groups to periodically rotate or open spots.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use Google Analytics to understand how the site is used. No data is sold to third parties.

legal_notice.title: Legal notice
legal_notice.intro: In compliance with Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following information identifies the owner of this website.
legal_notice.owner_name: Legal name: Associació de jugadors i jugadores de jocs de taula i rol Darkstone Catalunya. Trade name: Darkstone.Cat.
legal_notice.purpose_text: This website aims to inform about the activities, events and operation of Associació Darkstone Catalunya, as well as to facilitate contact with interested individuals.
legal_notice.ip_text: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, graphic design and source code, is the property of Associació Darkstone Catalunya or its respective authors, and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Reproduction, distribution or transformation without prior authorisation is prohibited.
legal_notice.liability_text: Associació Darkstone Catalunya is not responsible for any damages that may arise from the use of this website, nor does it guarantee the absence of errors or interruptions in service.
legal_notice.links_text: This website may contain links to third-party pages. Associació Darkstone Catalunya does not control and is not responsible for the content of those pages.
legal_notice.law_text: The terms of use of this website are governed by Spanish law. The courts of Terrassa shall have jurisdiction over any disputes.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy policy
privacy_policy.intro: This policy explains how Associació Darkstone Catalunya collects, uses and protects the personal data of users of this website, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018 on Personal Data Protection.
privacy_policy.controller_text: The data controller is Associació de jugadors i jugadores de jocs de taula i rol Darkstone Catalunya. You can contact us at darkstone.cat@gmail.com.
privacy_policy.data_form: Contact form: We collect your name, email address, subject and message for the sole purpose of responding to your enquiries.
privacy_policy.data_analytics: Web analytics: We use Google Analytics and Vercel Analytics to obtain anonymous usage statistics (pages visited, visit duration, device, etc.). This data is used exclusively to improve content and user experience.
privacy_policy.legal_basis_consent: Consent: For the submission of the contact form and the use of analytical cookies, the legal basis is your explicit consent.
privacy_policy.legal_basis_interest: Legitimate interest: For the technical operation of the website and service improvement.
privacy_policy.retention_text: Contact form data is retained for the time necessary to handle the enquiry and for a maximum of one year. Analytics data is retained according to Google Analytics and Vercel retention policies.
privacy_policy.rights_text: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, portability, restriction and objection by sending an email to darkstone.cat@gmail.com. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (aepd.es).
privacy_policy.third_parties_text: Contact form data is processed through the hosting provider (Vercel). Analytics data is processed by Google (Google Analytics) and Vercel (Vercel Analytics). These services may involve international data transfers covered by the European Commission's standard contractual clauses.
privacy_policy.updates_text: This privacy policy may be updated periodically. Last updated: February 2026.

collaborators.title: Our Partners
collaborators.subtitle: Thanks to those who make this adventure possible
collaborators.editorial_invite: Are you a publisher or shop and want to collaborate with us? We organize demos, game days, and events. You can reach us through our <contactLink>contact form</contactLink> or write to us directly at <emailLink>darkstone.cat@gmail.com</emailLink>.

descriptions.ajuntament-terrassa: Terrassa City Council supports the city's cultural and gaming organisations, providing spaces and resources for our activities.
descriptions.diputacio-barcelona: The Barcelona Provincial Council promotes the associative network of the province, collaborating with organisations like Darkstone Catalunya.
descriptions.devir: Founded in 1987, Devir is the largest publisher of modern games in Spanish, Portuguese, and Catalan. They brought classics like Catan and Carcassonne to these markets and created acclaimed original titles such as White Castle and Bitoku.
descriptions.maldito-games: Spanish publisher founded in 2015, specialising in bringing top titles like Brass Birmingham, Terraforming Mars, and Barcelona to the Spanish-speaking market. Over 300 games in their catalogue, with attention to detail as their hallmark.
descriptions.2-tomatoes: Publisher founded in 2016, combining world-renowned licences like Root, Pax Pamir, and Magic Maze with original creations. They champion games as educational tools and actively collaborate with content creators and associations.
descriptions.dmz: A young publisher backing homegrown designers alongside hand-picked international titles like Urban Sketchers, Harmony, and Lorenzo il Magnifico. Quality in design, components, and artwork above all else.
descriptions.draco-ideas: Draco Ideas is a Spanish publisher that stands out for its thematic games and attention to detail in every production.
descriptions.eclipse: Spanish publisher founded in 2017, championing homegrown talent. Creators of Skull Tales and Tambores de Guerra, with an adventure-filled catalogue for all audiences. Linked to Draco Ideas.
descriptions.games-4-gamers: Barcelona-based publisher founded in 2014 by two neighbourhood friends with one clear idea: games are culture, education, and fun. They make board games for all players.
descriptions.juegorama: Publisher and miniatures manufacturer from Zaragoza, founded in 2014. Passionate about detail, they've brought titles like Massive Darkness 2 and GI JOE Deck Building Game while crafting high-quality miniatures.
descriptions.key-enigma: A team dedicated to crafting escape adventures that blend puzzles, narrative, and technology. Their boxes blur the line between reality and fiction with real websites, phone calls, and emails.
descriptions.synergic-games: Publisher founded to launch Harakiri: Blades of Honor, a cooperative dungeon-crawler set in feudal Japan. Stunning art from renowned illustrators and sculpted miniatures for total immersion.
descriptions.sd-games: SD Games is a publisher founded in 2015 with the goal of bringing modern board games to a wider audience while building a catalogue that also appeals to experienced gamers. A division of SD Distribuciones, Spain's leading specialist distributor with 25 years of experience, they are committed to championing Spanish designers and illustrators, giving visibility to homegrown talent of outstanding quality.
descriptions.tranjis-games: Three geeks, one crazy idea in 2014, and Virus! was born — the best-selling Spanish card game ever with over 3 million copies sold. Today they're a leading publisher with titles like It's a Wonderful World.
descriptions.trencadaus: TrencaDaus is the brainchild of Jordi and Susana, two game lovers who left the film industry to create unforgettable tabletop experiences. Design, creativity, and passion in every game.
descriptions.ak-interactive: A leading Spanish brand in scale modelling, specialising in paints, tools, and products for models and dioramas. We hosted the presentation of their PLAYMARKERS, a marker system for organising scale model parts, designed for modellers of all levels.
descriptions.awaken-realms: Polish publisher behind crowdfunding hits such as Nemesis, Tainted Grail, and ISS Vanguard. Born as a miniature painting studio, they stand out for their spectacular figures and deep game designs. We collaborated with them to host the official Castles of Burgundy tournament, with their stunning miniature edition as the prize.
descriptions.mel-negra: A Catalan publisher committed to releasing tabletop RPGs and board games in Catalan. They translate titles from the English-speaking world and produce material with local talent, always using FSC-certified paper and Catalan suppliers. We joined the presentation and play session of their RPG Misèries i malaurances.
descriptions.nosolorol: A Madrid-based publisher with over fifteen years of experience specialising in tabletop RPGs. Their catalogue includes classics like Aquelarre, Vampire: The Masquerade, and Dune, as well as internationally licensed in-house productions. They provided us with material to showcase and demo some of their games at Egara Juga.
descriptions.looping-games: A Spanish publisher born in 2013 from the union of Perepau Llistosella's mechanical finesse and Pedro Soto's artistic expressiveness. They publish great 20th-century stories inside small boxes, with acclaimed titles such as «1911 Amundsen vs Scott», «Topoum», and the 1900 series. Passionate about design, narrative, and the craft of turning hand-drawn prototypes into successful published games.
descriptions.outlet-games: Online shop specialising in board games at great prices. They maintain a close bond with Darkstone Catalunya and the gaming community.
descriptions.trollcave: A young shop in Terrassa specialising in wargames, board games, and TCGs. They host regular gaming sessions and we've collaborated to play at their shop.
descriptions.nikochan: Shop specialising in comics, merchandise, books, board games, and TCGs. They host Digimon, One Piece, and other tournaments. We've collaborated to organise open gaming sessions at their shop.
descriptions.kame-kame-comics: A go-to geek shop in Catalonia with 5 retail locations, specialising in manga, comics, figures, board games, and wargames. A paradise for anyone who lives pop culture with passion.
descriptions.el-carton-peleon: Shop specialising in TCGs with daily tournaments across multiple games. Also passionate about board games, they host planned gaming sessions and have a small open game library for everyone.
descriptions.stastarat: A veteran Terrassa association with nearly 40 years of history and around 80 members. RPGs, board games, wargames, and video games. They have their own venue and host 12-hour gaming days every month.
descriptions.la-torre-de-daus: La Torre de Daus is a non-profit cultural association from Sabadell, with a 220m²+ venue equipped with gaming tables, scenography, a game library, painting workshop and bar. Specialising in wargames, miniatures, historical simulation and board games, members enjoy 24h access with their own key.
descriptions.tastajocs: A gaming cultural association from Castellar del Vallès with 52 members, founded in 2019 as a regular group and officially established as an association in 2025. Specialising in modern board games and RPGs, they meet every Friday and Saturday at their venue with two gaming rooms.
descriptions.darkstone-es: Darkstone is a leading online community and forum in Spain dedicated to board games and crowdfunding. A meeting point for enthusiasts looking for news, discussions, buying and selling, and event organisation around geek culture and board games.
descriptions.professor-mompi: Our go-to game educator. A channel dedicated to board game tutorials in Catalan, especially expert-level games. A key reference for the Catalan-speaking gaming community.
descriptions.jugador-inicial: A board game outreach portal in Catalan created by Àlex in 2020. Tutorials, recommendations and the latest releases for anyone who loves board games. A project that keeps growing thanks to its community.
descriptions.cunyadisme-ludic: The gaming podcast nobody asked for but you need to hear. Hosted by Adrià alongside Karen, Alberto and Àlex, it was born from a group of friends brought together by board games who ended up talking about everything. Humour, friendship and board games in Catalan.
descriptions.barbut-indepe: A Darkstone Catalunya member, die-hard eurogamer who hates dice and advocate for the use of Catalan in the board gaming world. On his Instagram he reviews and analyses the games he plays.

cookie_policy.title: Cookie policy
cookie_policy.intro: This page explains what cookies are, which ones we use on this website and how you can manage them.
cookie_policy.what_text: Cookies are small text files stored in your browser when you visit a website. They are used to remember preferences, analyse traffic and improve the browsing experience.
cookie_policy.cookies_necessary: Technical cookies: Essential for the website to function. These include the consent preference cookie that remembers your choice regarding analytical cookies.
cookie_policy.cookies_analytics: Analytical cookies: Only activated if you accept their use. We use Google Analytics (_ga, _ga_* cookies) for anonymous visit statistics, and Vercel Analytics for performance metrics.
cookie_policy.third_party_google: Google Analytics: Google may process collected data according to its privacy policy (policies.google.com/privacy).
cookie_policy.third_party_vercel: Vercel Analytics: Vercel processes web performance metrics (vercel.com/docs/analytics).
cookie_policy.manage_text: You can accept or reject analytical cookies via the banner that appears the first time you visit the website. You can also configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Please note that blocking all cookies may affect the functionality of some features.
cookie_policy.updates_text: This cookie policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in the cookies used or applicable regulations.
